subject: Product Management
title: Susan Wojcicki and AdSense
description: A fast breakdown of Susan Wojcicki and AdSense for builders.

hook.text: Susan Wojcicki rented her garage to Larry Page and Sergey Brin. Then she became Google's most impactful PM.

buildup.text: She led the development of AdSense — the system that places Google ads on third-party websites.

discovery.text: AdSense turned every website into a potential revenue source. It funded the internet's creator economy.

twist.text: One product decision — letting any website host ads — generated more revenue than most companies earn in total.

climax.text: Wojcicki later ran YouTube for nine years, shaping how billions consume video.

punchline.text: She rented a garage and changed how the internet makes money.

quiz.question: What product did Susan Wojcicki lead at Google?
options: AdSense — the system placing ads on third-party websites
